title: Scrimblos!
description: Adds alot of funny lil' bugs to the game! :3
body:
# <center>Scrimblos!</center>

![Created for VitrificaSMP](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tomcqt/cdn.tomcat.sh/refs/heads/main/misc/created_for_vitrifica_vector.svg) ![Requires Geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1c2a21f83894a693e9b8e4812e67f92bdc8e03e.png) [![Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9d2c289db211cf86af07adb3d181b4ea5624296.png)](https://discord.gg/V3DTUtgGeG)

Scrimblos are a new pet type, which can help you fight monsters and come with a variety of colorful variants! :3

Scrimblos spawn in Desert, Savanna, Forest and Badlands biomes!

As a little bonus, you can put Scrimblos in the Hat trinket slot if you have the [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) mod installed!

![A Scrimblo sitting on a player's head.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e41e5a04476b9b138113dafea6eae9c8aaa15ed7.png)

![Two Scrimblos (Albino and Desert) sleeping in front of an acacia tree in a savanna.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/674fb361d0bf2eee30d4bfe5238a0aa4b876cdd1.png)

## Item
There is a new item, the Scrimblo Bag! The Scrimblo Bag can collect and release up to five Scrimblos by default!

![The recipe of the Scrimblo Bag item, consisting of three string and four leather.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72e44aad81ed3647ad25cd11fffa4a6c85b22a72.png)

## Enchantment
This mod also adds an enchantment for the bags called Packing, which increases the maximum capacity.

- Level 1: 5 -> 10
- Level 2: 5 -> 15
- Level 3: 5 -> 20

The enchantment can be obtained by trading with Librarian or Leatherworker villagers, or in fisherman village chests, and by enchanting a Scrimblo Bag in an enchanting table.

> If you play with [Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement), it will always max to level 2.
  
## Variants
Scrimblos have alot of variants, most of which being accessible by renaming a Scrimblo with a name tag or in an anvil when picked up.
You can pick a *random* pride variant by naming a scrimblo "pride"!
When it's the birthday of a specific variant's owner, it will show a party hat model on the specific type's Scrimblo! (Also applies for all Scrimblos if it's the mod's birthday.)

![A Scrimblo being held in a player's hand when picked up.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/837fd3071b5157110579ab8ce5c302b7b7b7ccf0.png)

> To see all of the variants and how to obtain each one, please head towards the "Gallery" section of this page.
> Also, this mod is heavily inspired by [RAT's Mischief](https://modrinth.com/mod/rats-mischief) by doctor4t! <3
